title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 013
task1_desc: Write a script to print the date of last **Friday** of every month of a given year. For example, if the given year is **2019** then it should print the following:
task1_body:
Write a script to print the date of last **Friday** of every month of a given year. For example, if the given year is **2019** then it should print the following:

    2019/01/25
    2019/02/22
    2019/03/29
    2019/04/26
    2019/05/31
    2019/06/28
    2019/07/26
    2019/08/30
    2019/09/27
    2019/10/25
    2019/11/29
    2019/12/27
task2_desc: Write a script to demonstrate **Mutually Recursive** methods. Two methods are mutually recursive if the first method calls the second and the second calls first in turn. Using the mutually recursive methods, generate [Hofstadter Female and Male sequences](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hofstadter_sequence#Hofstadter_Female_and_Male_sequences).
task2_body:
Write a script to demonstrate **Mutually Recursive** methods. Two methods are mutually recursive if the first method calls the second and the second calls first in turn. Using the mutually recursive methods, generate [Hofstadter Female and Male sequences](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hofstadter_sequence#Hofstadter_Female_and_Male_sequences).

     F ( 0 ) = 1   ;   M ( 0 ) = 0
     F ( n ) = n − M ( F ( n − 1 ) ) , n > 0
     M ( n ) = n − F ( M ( n − 1 ) ) , n > 0.
